releaseNotes:
• Feature: Debug log file is now cleared automatically the first time the app boots on a new version. The cleared-for version is tracked separately so this fires exactly once per build — restarts within the same version do not touch the log. Useful when sharing a log for triage so you only see entries from the new build.
• Confirmed: All Stream Scanner settings (Streams per scan, Scan timeout) persist across app restarts and version updates. The settings table uses an upsert pattern, so new keys are stored on first save without any database migration.
